Document:
# Medical V2
## Overview - The medical system has heavily changed. - Patients now suffer specific wounds on their limbs. - Untreated wounds reduce the maximum health of the affected limb. - Trauma kits, gauze, burn kits, ointment, and hemostatic gauze treat wounds normally. - Once every wound on a limb is treated, the wounds passively recover and the limb can return to full health.
## Field treatment crafting - Use [keybind="CMUOpenMedicalCraftingMenu"] to fast craft medical treatments. - Crafting uses one ingredient and one packed trauma kit. - Coagulant powder and a packed trauma kit create a normal trauma kit. - Burn gel and a packed trauma kit create a normal burn kit.
## Ingredients
\n
## Base items
## Surgical line and synth graft - Surgical line now heals limb health only. - Synth graft now heals limb health only. - Neither item treats wounds or restores maximum limb health by itself. - Treat wounds first, then use line or graft when the limb still needs health.
